title: DISABLED AMERICAN VETERANS - 211info
text: DISABLED AMERICAN VETERANS VA REGIONAL OFFICE OREGON DISABLED AMERICAN VETERANS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps individuals access benefits and services earned through military service and provided by the Department of Veterans Affairs (VA) and other government agencies such as healthcare, disability compensation, education, employment, and financial assistance. Provides additional support services like job finding assistance, Medicare information and counseling, transportation to medical appointments, emergency financial grants, support groups, volunteer opportunities, advocacy, and more. 100 SW Main Street Room 212a Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Veterans or dependents of veterans, with a focus on those with disabilities Hours: -National Call Center: 6am-1pm -Local Office Phone: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 8am-3:30pm, Wednesday 8am-noon -Local Office Walk in: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 8am-2:30pm, Wednesday 8am-noon Email (503) 412-4750 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Local Office (503) 412-4750 Toll-free (888) 604-0234 National Call Center Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of service, proof of need AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 12 Sandy Boulevard Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Families of Military Personnel/Veterans Benefits and Services Assistance * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Disability Related Transportation * Families of Military Personnel/Veterans Disability Related Transportation * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Disability Rights Groups * Families of Military Personnel/Veterans Disability Rights Groups * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Job Finding Assistance * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Medicaid Information/Counseling * Families of Military Personnel/Veterans Medicare Information/Counseling * Veterans * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Undesignated Temporary Financial Assistance * Families of Military Personnel/Veterans Undesignated Temporary Financial Assistance * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Veteran Support Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: TRANSPORTATION - DAV TRANSPORTATION NETWORK PORTLAND VA MEDICAL CENTER VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES - DAV DRIVERS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
